footer.tagline: Warehouse operations for modern e-commerce and marketplace teams.

hero.subtitle: FlowOps unifies packing, scanning, returns and reporting in a single workspace built for e-commerce brands, marketplace sellers and warehouse teams.
hero.footnote: No credit card required · Invite-only workspace · Cancel anytime

logos.trustedBy: Trusted by operations teams shipping millions of orders

overview.title: One workspace for every motion of your warehouse.
overview.body: FlowOps replaces the spreadsheets, sticky notes and disconnected tools your team uses to pack, scan and process returns. Everything flows into the same operational record, visible to owners, supervisors, packers and return staff.
bullets: Live packing queue with SLA-aware prioritisation
Barcode and QR scan audit trail (scanner-ready)
Return inspection workflow with resolution outcomes
Marketplace, courier and user productivity reporting
overview.moduleHint: Built-in module, ready on day one.

features.title: Everything operations teams need, nothing they don't.
features.subtitle: Built from the floor up for warehouses that ship — not adapted from a generic ERP.

packing.title: Packing operations
packing.desc: Live queue, priority filters and per-packer performance, so the right order is always next.

scanning.title: Barcode & QR tracking
scanning.desc: Every scan event captured with timestamp, user and station — a complete audit trail.

returns.title: Return management
returns.desc: RMA intake, inspection grading and resolution outcomes, all in one workflow.

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.desc: Marketplace mix, courier KPIs and user productivity, refreshed in real time.

rbac.title: Role-based access
rbac.desc: Owner, Supervisor, Packer and Return Staff — scoped to what each role actually needs.

invites.title: Workspace invites
invites.desc: First registered user becomes Owner. No public sign-up — invite only, by design.

howItWorks.title: From spreadsheet to shipping floor in under an hour.

create.title: Create your workspace
create.desc: Sign up in seconds. The first user becomes the workspace Owner.

invite.title: Invite your team
invite.desc: Add Supervisors, Packers and Return Staff with role-based access.

ship.title: Ship with confidence
ship.desc: Run packing, scanning and returns from one operational record.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that scales with your shipping volume.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your team is ready.

items.a: Operations teams at e-commerce brands, marketplace sellers and 3PL warehouses that need to coordinate packing, scanning and returns in one place.
The first registered user creates and owns a workspace. After that, new members join by invite only — there is no public sign-up into an existing workspace.
Owner, Supervisor, Packer and Return Staff. Each role has scoped access to the modules and actions they need.
Yes. The scan tracking module is scanner-ready and records every event with a full audit trail. Hardware integration is on the upcoming roadmap.

items.q: Which marketplaces do you integrate with?
items.a: Marketplace integrations are on our near-term roadmap. Today you can import orders and run reporting on marketplace mix using mock or uploaded data.
Yes. Paid plans are month-to-month and can be cancelled from your workspace settings.

cta.title: Ready to bring your warehouse into flow?
cta.subtitle: Create your workspace in under a minute. Invite your team. Start shipping smarter today.

features.title: Everything your warehouse needs in one workspace.
features.subtitle: Six built-in modules that replace the spreadsheets, sticky notes and disconnected tools your team uses today.

packing.title: Packing operations
packing.desc: A live queue that surfaces the next order to pack with SLA-aware priority, per-packer performance and station context.
points: Live order queue with priority filters

scanning.title: Barcode & QR scan tracking
scanning.desc: Every scan event captured with timestamp, user, station and outcome — a complete operational audit trail.
points: Full audit trail by SKU and order

returns.title: Return management
returns.desc: From RMA intake to inspection grading to resolution — the entire return lifecycle in one workflow.

reports.title: Reporting & analytics
reports.desc: Marketplace mix, courier KPIs and user productivity reporting — refreshed in real time.

rbac.title: Role-based access
rbac.desc: Owner, Supervisor, Packer and Return Staff — each role scoped to the modules and actions they need.

invites.title: Workspace & invites
invites.desc: First registered user becomes Owner. After that, members join by invite only — no public sign-up.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that scales with your shipping volume.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your team is ready. No hidden fees.

starter.name: Starter

slaBreach.desc: Alert when packing times exceed station targets.
